description: Cost price + brand fields on admin product form - The Prisma schema already has costPrice (Decimal?) and brand (String?) on the Product model. Add these fields to the product validation schema, product creation API, product update API, the add-product form, and the edit-product modal.
steps: In apps/web/lib/validations.ts: Add 'costPrice: z.coerce.number().positive().optional()' and 'brand: z.string().trim().max(100).optional()' to the productSchema object.

In apps/web/app/api/admin/products/route.ts POST handler: Include costPrice and brand in the prisma.product.create() data object from parsed.data (costPrice: parsed.data.costPrice ?? null, brand: parsed.data.brand?.trim() || null).

In apps/web/app/api/admin/products/[id]/route.ts PATCH handler: The handler already spreads ...productData into the update. Since costPrice and brand will now pass through the partial() schema, they will flow through automatically. No changes needed unless the spread doesn't include them - verify the destructuring.
In apps/web/app/api/admin/products/route.ts GET handler: Add costPrice and brand to the select object so they are returned in the product list.

In apps/web/components/admin/product-management-form.tsx: Add two new Input fields - one for 'brand' (text, placeholder 'Brand (optional)', maxLength 100) and one for 'costPrice' (number, placeholder 'Cost price (optional)', min 1, step 0.01). Include them in the payload object in submit().

In apps/web/components/admin/admin-products-client.tsx: Add costPrice (number, optional) and brand (string, optional) to the AdminProduct type. In the EditProductModal form state, add costPrice and brand fields. Add two new Input fields in the edit form for brand and costPrice. Include them in the PATCH payload.
acceptance_criteria: productSchema in validations.ts includes costPrice and brand fields
POST /api/admin/products saves costPrice and brand to the database
PATCH /api/admin/products/[id] can update costPrice and brand
GET /api/admin/products returns costPrice and brand in the response
The add-product form has brand and cost price input fields
The edit-product modal has brand and cost price input fields
verification: Read the modified files to confirm the fields are properly integrated
findings: PATCH handler already spreads ...productData into Prisma update, so costPrice and brand flow through automatically with no code changes needed in [id]/route.ts. Pre-existing TS errors exist in many admin pages (implicit any types) but none in modified files. tsconfig.tsbuildinfo was updated by tsc but not committed as it is a build artifact.
